task_completion.description: Verify the vendor 'Rhine Valley Components GmbH' was created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a vendor, supplier, or contact record screen displaying the name 'Rhine Valley Components GmbH'.

task_completion.description: Verify the vendor's address, phone, and email are correctly entered.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the vendor record showing the address 'Industriestraße 47, Frankfurt, 60329, Germany', phone '+49 69 7891234', and email 'orders@rhinevalley-components.de'.

task_completion.description: Verify a Purchase Order is created for the correct vendor and in EUR currency.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a Purchase Order screen where the selected vendor/supplier is 'Rhine Valley Components GmbH' and the currency is explicitly set to EUR (or Euro).

task_completion.description: Verify the first line item for Precision Bearing Assembly Type-K.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a line item on the Purchase Order for 'Precision Bearing Assembly Type-K' with a quantity of 50 and a unit price of 42.50.

task_completion.description: Verify the second line item for Industrial Servo Motor Controller.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a line item on the Purchase Order for 'Industrial Servo Motor Controller' with a quantity of 25 and a unit price of 189.00.

task_completion.description: Verify the Purchase Order is confirmed and shows the correct total amount.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a status indicator showing the PO is 'Confirmed' (or 'Approved'/'Locked') and a total order amount of 6850.00 (or 6,850.00).

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the application's graphical user interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with a business management/ERP web application (e.g., Odoo, ERPNext, etc.), not a terminal or command-line interface executing scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not fake the output in a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: The data should be displayed within the structured fields, tables, and forms of the application, not typed into a plain text editor, notes app, or HTML mock-up.

integrity.description: Verify the PO confirmation is a genuine system status.
integrity.visual_evidence: The 'Confirmed' status should appear as a standard UI badge, button state, or workflow indicator in the application, rather than just text typed into a description or reference field.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Vendor Name: Rhine Valley Components GmbH. Vendor Country: Germany. Currency: EUR. Line Item 1: Precision Bearing Assembly Type-K, Qty: 50, Unit Price: 42.50. Line Item 2: Industrial Servo Motor Controller, Qty: 25, Unit Price: 189.00. Total PO Amount: 6850.00 EUR.
